reason: Verified that the SuperAgent browser use feature can execute browser commands, navigate to a URL, retrieve the page title, and return a response containing the expected text.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface
Found "QA-20260505-032741-ng84" agent in the left sidebar under "Your Agents" — Agent was visible and accessible
Clicked on the agent "QA-20260505-032741-ng84" in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened successfully
Clicked on the message input field and typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was entered into the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and agent began processing
Waited for agent to complete processing (took 7 seconds) — Agent finished with status "idle" and "Worked for 7s"
Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." in the chat
Took a screenshot showing the completed response — Screenshot captured showing the full browser use workflow with tool cards and the verified response text
